'''bofadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactable|reactable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactable|reactable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bofadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadhithi|bofadhithi]] || [[word:bofadhiji|bofadhiji]] || [[word:bofadhishi|bofadhishi]] || [[word:bofadhiki|bofadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadhuthuthu|bofadhuthuthu]] || [[word:bofadhujuju|bofadhujuju]] || [[word:bofadhushushu|bofadhushushu]] || [[word:bofadhukuku|bofadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadhuthu|bofadhuthu]] || [[word:bofadhuju|bofadhuju]] || [[word:bofadhushu|bofadhushu]] || [[word:bofadhuku|bofadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadhufthuf|bofadhufthuf]] || [[word:bofadhufjuf|bofadhufjuf]] || [[word:bofadhufshuf|bofadhufshuf]] || [[word:bofadhufkuf|bofadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadhethe|bofadhethe]] || [[word:bofadheje|bofadheje]] || [[word:bofadheshe|bofadheshe]] || [[word:bofadheke|bofadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadhothotho|bofadhothotho]] || [[word:bofadhojojo|bofadhojojo]] || [[word:bofadhoshosho|bofadhoshosho]] || [[word:bofadhokoko|bofadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadhotho|bofadhotho]] || [[word:bofadhojo|bofadhojo]] || [[word:bofadhosho|bofadhosho]] || [[word:bofadhoko|bofadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadhofthof|bofadhofthof]] || [[word:bofadhofjof|bofadhofjof]] || [[word:bofadhofshof|bofadhofshof]] || [[word:bofadhofkof|bofadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadhïfthïf|bofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfjïf|bofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfshïf|bofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfkïf|bofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadhïfthïfthïf|bofadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfjïfjïf|bofadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfshïfshïf|bofadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfkïfkïf|bofadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadhïfthïf|bofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfjïf|bofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfshïf|bofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfkïf|bofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadhïfthïf|bofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfjïf|bofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfshïf|bofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:bofadhïfkïf|bofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadhæthæ|bofadhæthæ]] || [[word:bofadhæjæ|bofadhæjæ]] || [[word:bofadhæshæ|bofadhæshæ]] || [[word:bofadhækæ|bofadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadhathatha|bofadhathatha]] || [[word:bofadhajaja|bofadhajaja]] || [[word:bofadhashasha|bofadhashasha]] || [[word:bofadhakaka|bofadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadhatha|bofadhatha]] || [[word:bofadhaja|bofadhaja]] || [[word:bofadhasha|bofadhasha]] || [[word:bofadhaka|bofadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadhafthaf|bofadhafthaf]] || [[word:bofadhafjaf|bofadhafjaf]] || [[word:bofadhafshaf|bofadhafshaf]] || [[word:bofadhafkaf|bofadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bofadhasha|bofadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofadhshësha|bofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofadhrosha|bofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofadhmusha|bofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofadhyasha|bofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofadhnkshësha|gobofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofadhnkrosha|gobofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofadhnkmusha|gobofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofadhnkyasha|gobofadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bofafadhasha|bofafadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafadhshësha|bofafadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafadhrosha|bofafadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafadhmusha|bofafadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafadhyasha|bofafadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafadhnkshësha|gobofafadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafadhnkrosha|gobofafadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafadhnkmusha|gobofafadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafadhnkyasha|gobofafadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:befædhasha|befædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:befædhshësha|befædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:befædhrosha|befædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:befædhmusha|befædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:befædhyasha|befædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobefædhnkshësha|gobefædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobefædhnkrosha|gobefædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobefædhnkmusha|gobefædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobefædhnkyasha|gobefædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bofadhasha|bofadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofadhshësha|bofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofadhrosha|bofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofadhmusha|bofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofadhyasha|bofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofadhnkshësha|gobofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofadhnkrosha|gobofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofadhnkmusha|gobofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofadhnkyasha|gobofadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
